title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS libraries to pull and run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, CodeLlama, etc. locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embeddings, pull, list, delete models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node & browsers (via proxy) to chat, generate, embed with local models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration letting you swap in any Ollama model as an LLM or chat backend in chains & agents.

title: ollama-webui
summary: ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI) with multi-user, model manager, RAG, voice.

title: ollama-cli (npm)
summary: Community npm CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API for quick chat, model pulls, and listing from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions & chat sidebar.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama server + GPU node selector and PVC for caching models in Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama embeddings + llama.cpp for retrieval and local LLM generation.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client library for Ollama with Kotlin extensions, Spring Boot starter, and reactive wrappers.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that lets servers chat with any local Ollama model through slash commands.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration package to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: function-calling, structured JSON, vision, voice, Docker Compose stacks, GPU tuning.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim language client for Ollama with async HTTP, SSE streaming, and native JSON mapping.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for the Ollama REST API with tokio & serde.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama supporting .NET 6+ with IAsyncEnumerable streaming and dependency injection.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger CI module that spins up an Ollama service container for testing LLM calls inside pipelines.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local Ollama models for summarizing notes, brainstorming, and Q&A inside vaults.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command to query local models with thread-aware context.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision EC2 GPU instances with Ollama server and model cache on startup.
